prerequisites: A Countercyclical account with the ability to generate an API key. These developer features are generally available for Enterprise customers; contact enterprise@countercyclical.io for access.
A Countercyclical workspace. Each API key is associated with a member within a workspace, so the key can only access items within that workspace.
The api_key value generated in your Countercyclical workspace (format: ck_prod_...). Copy it when shown, since the secret is displayed only once and cannot be retrieved afterward.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Countercyclical authenticates every API request with a workspace API key, which maps to this connector's api_key secret field. The key (format ck_prod_...) is passed as the apiKey query parameter on calls to https://api.countercyclical.io. Each key is associated with a member within a single workspace, so it can only access items in that workspace.

setupSteps.title: Open the Developer settings in your workspace
setupSteps.body: In the Countercyclical dashboard, navigate to the Settings tab in your workspace, select Advanced Settings from the dropdown, and click Developer.

setupSteps.title: Create and copy an API key
setupSteps.body: Click Create API Key, provide a name and description to identify its purpose, then click Generate. The generated key (format ck_prod_...) is shown only once, so copy and store it securely (storing it as an environment variable is recommended). You can revoke a key at any time by clicking Revoke, or edit its name and description.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in this connector's required api_key field. The connector uses it to authenticate against the Countercyclical API, sent as the apiKey query parameter.

setupSteps.title: Run the sync
setupSteps.body: With the API key configured, the connector authenticates as the key's member in its workspace and can extract the available Countercyclical streams (Investments, Valuations, and Memos) for loading into your destination.
